name: weebly-site-editor
description: Draft, inspect, test, and roll out custom code to classic Weebly and Square Online sites.

interface.shortDescription: Work safely on classic Weebly and Square Online site code.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex understand a classic Weebly or Square Online site, back up theme code, draft custom HTML/CSS/JavaScript, inspect and test changes locally, then roll out reviewed changes through the Weebly editor or supported Square Online APIs.
defaultPrompt: Prepare a safe Weebly theme edit for Korea Grand Tour.
Inspect my Weebly theme backup before editing.
Explain where this code belongs in my Weebly theme.
